# Test showing that our testcallgraph DOES stitch test scripts to programs

# Create a simple test file
mkdir -p demo
setstdin # Test that executes mcpdiff
exec mcpdiff --help
exec cat > demo/test_script.txt

# Build our stitching tool
exec go build -o stitch ./testcallgraph/cmd/stitch

# Use our tool to analyze the test and find connections
exec ./stitch -test demo/test_script.txt
stdout 'Found.*program connections'
stdout 'mcpdiff.*main.go'

# This shows our tool successfully:
# 1. Analyzed the scripttest file
# 2. Found the exec mcpdiff command
# 3. Located mcpdiff's main function
# 4. Created the connection between test and program
